features.name: equality comparison of concatenations with repeated signals
features.description: Code should include an equality comparison between two concatenations where the same signal appears multiple times in each concatenation but at different positions

features.name: non-equality comparison with repeated signals in concatenation
features.description: Code should include a non-equality comparison between concatenations containing the same repeated signal at different positions

features.name: concatenation size mismatch with repeated signals in comparison
features.description: Code should include an equality comparison between concatenations of different bit widths where both contain the same repeated signal

features.name: literal value compared to concatenation with repeated signals
features.description: Code should include an equality comparison between a concatenation containing a repeated signal and a literal value

features.name: cross-concatenation equality with different signal ordering
features.description: Code should include an equality comparison between concatenations where signals appear in different order across two different signals (a and b)
